originalTitle: STEEL BALL RUN JoJo's Bizarre Adventure 2nd STAGE | Official Trailer | Netflix
content: STEEL BALL RUN JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure 2nd & 3rd Stage (all 11 episodes) will premiere on Netflix each Friday, starting on September 25. A desert crossing spanning roughly 750 miles—the land that Johnny Joestar and Gyro Zeppeli must make their way through, is home to the dreaded area known as the “Devil’s Palm.” As ominous incidents begin to unfold, they are forced to realize that this race is far more than a mere competition. The two press forward into the 2nd STAGE, where countless hidden motives collide. Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/82181513 About Netflix: Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. chineseContent: 《STEEL BALL RUN JoJo 的奇妙冒险》第二和第三阶段（全 11 集）将于 9 月 25 日开始每周五在 Netflix 首播。约翰尼·乔斯达和陀螺·齐贝利必须穿过的一片绵延约 750 英里的沙漠穿越之地，是被称为“魔鬼棕榈”的可怕区域的所在地。随着不祥事件的发生，他们被迫意识到这场比赛不仅仅是一场比赛。两人前进到了第二阶段，无数隐藏的动机在这里碰撞。在 Netflix 上观看：https://www.netflix.com/title/82181513 关于 Netflix：Netflix 是世界领先的娱乐服务公司之一，提供多种类型和语言的电视剧、电影、游戏和现场节目。会员可以随时随地随意播放、暂停和继续观看，并且可以随时更改计划。钢球跑 JoJo的奇妙冒险 第二阶段 |官方预告片| Netflix https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix
